summary: Plugin capability system: 9 trust-boundary issues, 4 parallel data structure desyncs, 5 missing typed error classes discovered during cartography
detail: Full terrain map at docs/json/opencode/sessions/ses_180a31f09/cartography-plugin-lifecycle-terrain.v1.json. Key findings: (1) dynamic import executes before capability gating (critical), (2) ALWAYS_ALLOWED_HOOKS expose config/auth/secrets to external plugins (high), (3) no hook timeout — hung handler blocks serial dispatch (high), (4) 'verified' trust level defined but zero code paths use it, (5) crash quarantine evadable via oscillation, (6) PluginHealthStore and CapabilityRegistry desync crashCount on success paths.
